profile: CMS Developer with over 5 years of experience building and managing content-driven platforms for SaaS and B2B enterprises. Delivered 8+ headless CMS implementations using Strapi, Contentful, Sanity.io, and Payload CMS, improving content publishing workflows and reducing editorial turnaround times by 30%. Architected Jamstack solutions with Next.js and React, achieving sub-second load times and strong Lighthouse performance scores. Integrated AI-powered content generation and SEO automation pipelines that contributed to measurable organic traffic growth for enterprise clients. Experienced in collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable, multilingual content platforms on schedule.

projects.name: Tales of You – Personalized Storybook Generator
projects.description: AI storytelling platform turning selfies and prompts into personalized children's storybooks with custom characters, narration, and interactive flipbook reading.
features: Built and maintained the CMS layer powering dynamic content management for storybook templates and user-generated narratives
Integrated headless CMS architecture with Next.js for server-side rendering and SEO-optimized content delivery
Implemented Stripe payment integration and content gating for premium storybook features
Managed media assets pipeline using AWS S3 and CloudFront for global content distribution

projects.name: JustBeMe.ai – AI Business Assistant
projects.description: AI assistant automating inbound/outbound communications across calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and email, with knowledge base answers and real-time appointment booking.
features: Developed and structured the knowledge base content management system for AI-driven responses
Built content workflows for managing WhatsApp and SMS templates across multiple client variants (UAE, France)
Implemented CMS-driven configuration for appointment booking flows with Google Calendar integration
Created admin interfaces for managing communication templates and AI assistant behavior
